## Meeting Purpose

[Screening interview for the Engagement Manager role at Growthx.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Role:** An Engagement Manager (EM) at Growthx manages 8–12 organic content accounts, owning client relationships and strategy. The P0 KPI is client renewals.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
  - [**The Candidate:** Ashley M has 10 years of SEO experience (agency, in-house, consulting), including building SEO teams and strategies from scratch at agencies and Teachable.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [**The Challenge:** The role is new (3 weeks old) and undefined. The key challenge for an EM is balancing client-facing strategy with enabling the editorial team's quality feedback loop without getting involved in daily production.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=1198.0)
  - [**The Fit:** Ashley's experience building processes in undefined environments (e.g., Teachable) and managing complex client dynamics aligns with the role's needs.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)

## Topics

### The Role: Engagement Manager at Growthx

  - [**Company Context:** Growthx is a 1.5-year-old agency using an internal AI platform for organic blog content. It is currently undergoing a reorg and defining new roles.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [**Delivery Model:** A traditional pod structure.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
      - [**Engagement Manager (EM):** Manages 8 accounts (scaling to 12).](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=353.0)
          - [**Focus:** Client strategy, relationships, and renewals.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
          - [**KPIs:** Relationship strength → renewals and expansions.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
      - [**Production Layer:** Content Managers/Managing Editors own end-to-end content production for 2–3 accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Specialist Layer:** Directors/specialists provide support for technical SEO or major strategy shifts.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [**Client Onboarding:** All clients start with an 8-week "strategy sprint" where EMs define the initial engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [**Future Vision:** The internal AI platform will eventually become an external product offering.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)

### The Candidate: Ashley M's Background

  - [**Experience:** 10 years in marketing, primarily as an SEO Manager.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [**Agency Experience:**](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Built SEO teams from scratch.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
      - [Scaled an agency team from 20 to 100+ clients.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
      - [Hired, onboarded, and trained SEOs.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [**In-House Experience:**](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
      - [First SEO Manager at Teachable.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
      - [Built the entire SEO structure and KPIs from scratch.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [**Consulting Experience:**](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
      - [Works with travel brands (e.g., Norwegian Cruise Line, American Airlines) on content and technical SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [**Client-Facing Skills:**](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
      - [Managed VIP clients; ran onboarding and ongoing account management.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Presents complex SEO strategies to diverse audiences (e.g., 20-person client teams vs. small startups).](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)

### Candidate's Approach to Key Challenges

  - [**Managing Stakeholders (Teachable Example):**](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
      - [**Challenge:** Introduced SEO to a company unfamiliar with its value, requiring buy-in from multiple teams (engineering, content, dev, brand).](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
      - [**Solution:** Conducted a deep audit → created a 6-month plan with projected ROI → secured executive buy-in and budget.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
      - [**Key Insight:** Success hinged on connecting SEO efforts directly to business outcomes (leads, ROI), not just vanity metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [**Organization & Prioritization:**](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
      - [**Method:** Works backward from deadlines using PM tools (Monday.com, ClickUp, Jira).](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
      - [**Prioritization:** Uses a matrix to focus on high-impact, low-lift tasks first.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)
      - [**Tool Philosophy:** The workflow built *within* a tool is more critical than the tool itself.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [**Handling Client Pushback:**](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
      - [**Example:** A client's dev team resisted a high-lift SEO recommendation.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
      - [**Solution:** Offered alternative solutions while clearly setting expectations on the trade-off in results.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
      - [**Outcome:** The client ultimately decides, sometimes accepting a less impactful option for easier implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi Bailey:** Follow up with Ashley M.](https://fathom.video/share/T3edUmn3gwkeAc99Wyxjtwzye4Jias4R?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
